title: keraselma corifolium
intro: Keraselma corifolium, also known as Keraselma, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid compounds. The health benefits of Keraselma corifolium include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, such as wounds and ulcers. Herbal preparations of Keraselma corifolium are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or ethanol to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
